_comment: TEMPLATE palette for cool-tone portraits (e.g. 2B from NieR:Automata) — needs pure white (dress), pure black (blindfold/hair), silver (sword blade), skin tone, and red (emblem). The original 4 Canal Hideout colours cover pink/green/light-green/dark-brown but are NOT enough for a face or character portrait. Until the TODOs are filled with real decoration names, image_to_hideout() will refuse to load this palette (Palette.__post_init__ raises on unknown decoration names). The 5 new warm-tone decorations added in 0.2.1 (Maraket Rubble/Treasures/Samovar/Ornament + Coastal Pebble) do NOT fill these cool-tone TODOs — they are warm tan/gray. For warm-tone art, use examples/palette_warm.json instead (it loads cleanly today).
_how_to_fill: 1. In the game, place ONE of each missing decoration in your hideout.
4. The 'Unknown hashes' section lists the hash for each unknown name.
5. Add the entry to KNOWN_HASHES in src/hideout_art/constants.py.
6. Add the decoration name to ART_TYPES in the same file (if it's purely artistic).
7. Replace the TODO entries below with the actual decoration name.

_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.white: 2B's dress, skin highlights, skirt trim. Look for snow, marble, bone, white flowers, pale sand. STILL MISSING — strongest 0.2.2 candidates: Marble Bench / Marble Table / Marble Walls / Marble Fountain (need RGB sampling).
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.black: 2B's blindfold, hair, glove, boots. Look for charred wood, obsidian, ash, black sand, dark stone. STILL MISSING — Sand Tussock (78,52,46) is the closest existing option but too brown.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.gray: Shadows on dress, sword blade, metal details. Look for stone rubble, gravel, ash pile, slate. STILL MISSING — Maraket Samovar (148,133,115) is too warm; 0.2.2 Cave Fossil / Cave Coral may work as cool light gray (need RGB sampling).
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.silver: Sword blade highlights, metallic accents. Look for crystal, ice, polished stone. STILL MISSING — 0.2.2 Marble Fountain (with water) may work (need RGB sampling).
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.skin: 2B's skin (visible near eyes/neck). Look for pale tan sand, pale pink sand, peach flower. Falling Sand (248,187,208) is too pink — need peach/tan.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.pink: Glow accents, lips. COVERED by Falling Sand.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.red: Emblem on dress. Look for red flower, blood moss, ruby crystal, red candle. STILL MISSING — 0.2.2 Summit Brazier (fire) could work as warm red/orange (need RGB sampling).

_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Rubble: warm tan/khaki (138,120,94) — usable for mid-tone warm fills, NOT for cool 2B gray
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Treasures: dark warm gray (108,91,83) — too warm for 2B sword, but ok for warm shadow
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Samovar: light warm gray (148,133,115) — too warm for 2B sword, but ok for warm highlight
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Maraket Ornament: warm tan/khaki (136,120,97) — near-duplicate of Maraket Rubble
_available_warm_alternatives_in_0_2_1.Coastal Pebble: warm tan/khaki (134,115,94) — near-duplicate of Maraket Rubble

_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling._comment: These 18 new Canal decorations were added in 0.2.2 from user-provided exports. RGB values are ESTIMATED from screenshots — please send a clean screenshot to calibrate. The Marble series and Cave Fossil are the most promising candidates for the 2B cool palette.
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Marble Bench: light gray marble — top candidate for 2B 'white' role
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Marble Walls: light gray marble — alternate for 'white' or 'gray'
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Marble Fountain: light gray marble + water — candidate for 'silver'
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Cave Fossil: light gray/white ammonite — candidate for 'white' or 'gray'
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Cave Coral: pale gray/pink coral — candidate for 'gray' or 'skin'
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Summit Brazier: stone brazier (fire = warm orange) — candidate for 'red' if lit
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Pile of Leaves: autumn warm tones — not for 2B but useful for warm palettes
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Beech Tree: large tree — not for 2B (also LARGE footprint)
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Petrified Cave Figure: large statue — not for 2B (also LARGE footprint)
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Small Coastal Stone: small stone — too small for art use
_0_2_2_candidates_needing_rgb_sampling.Medium Coastal Stone: medium stone — could be 'gray' alt, need RGB

entries._role: white (dress, highlights) — STILL MISSING, look in-game
black (blindfold, hair) — STILL MISSING, Sand Tussock is closest but too brown
gray (shadows, sword) — STILL MISSING cool neutral gray; Maraket Samovar is warm
